label: 1510 CE
era_summary: Year 1510 (MDX) was a common year starting on Tuesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1510: Pope, Spain, France, emperor, Mantua-Venice, 1508-10. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1510: Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Pope, Spain, France, emperor, Mantua-Venice, 1508-10; Spain (Moors), 1509-11. Maddison records GDP/capita 1368 (ESP, 1510) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
